text.title: rust-project-structure Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for rust-project-structure as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Agent adds axum = "0.7" when the project is on axum = "0.6".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Axum 0.7 changed the router State API. Mixed versions cause trait-bound errors that are impossible to diagnose without knowing the version delta.

failure-mode.description: Using 'a lifetime parameters on service structs: UserService<'a>.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: LLMs emit lifetime parameters to borrow-check &Database, but tokio::spawn requires 'static. Use Arc<Database> or owned Database (which wraps Arc<PgPool> internally).

failure-mode.description: Mixing axum and actix-web imports in the same file after context overflow.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Axum and Actix handler signatures are incompatible. Pin the framework in the system prompt and add a CI check for the wrong import.

failure-mode.description: Forgetting to update default-members and CI paths when promoting to a Cargo workspace.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: cargo build --workspace must be proven to pass before the migration commit. Partial workspace migrations leave dead code that confuses subsequent agents.
